message.content:
@startuml
!theme plain

package "test" {
  package "usecase_test" {
    class "BrowseItemUseCaseTest" as BrowseItemUseCaseTest {
      <<C>>
    }
  }
  package "mock_repository" {
    class "ItemRepositoryMock" as ItemRepositoryMock {
      <<C>>
    }
  }
}

package "presentation" {
  package "api" {
    class "router" as router {
      <<C>>
    }
  }
}

package "infrastructure" {
  package "db" {
    class "ItemRepositoryDbMysql" as ItemRepositoryDbMysql {
      <<C>>
    }
  }
}

package "application" {
  package "usecase" {
    class "BrowseItemUseCase" as BrowseItemUseCase {
      <<C>>
    }
  }
  package "dto" {
    class "BrowseItemDto" as BrowseItemDto {
      <<C>>
    }
  }
}

package "domain" {
  package "repository" {
    interface "ItemRepository" as ItemRepository {
      <<I>>
    }
  }
  package "model" {
    class "ItemEntity" as ItemEntity {
      <<C>>
    }
  }
}
